reviews.review_title: This game made me crave death
reviews.review_description: Trying to play this game is equivalent to shoving my hands in a blender, the drifting Is terrible and makes it hard to steer, the game has no justifiable reason for being in vr, and even after 4 years of using vr this one game made me feel motion sick. the definition of torture is: the action or practice of inflicting severe pain or suffering on someone as a punishment or in order to force them to do or say something. This game is the closest a average Joe will come to torture. This should have stayed a mobile game. This game has no reason to be in vr, it's WORSE in vr, and the horrible controls and needlessly hard bots make me beg for deth. A little more forsite or development time would have made this feel amazing. A cart racer for stand-alone vr headsets? That sounds awesome but this? THIS SLOP!? Please I beg fix the movement up the graphics DO ANEYTHIG, this game it could be so good. In game i named my self John boom boi because I thought this game would be good enough to name myself after, but after playing for 20-30 minutes it became painfully obvious how much of a cash grab this was. Vr is hard to develop for and to need to put in more effort than this if you want a fun game.

developer_response.body:
Hello!
Thanks for your honest feedback. Based on your feedback we've enabled motion sickness mode by default so it's less likely to feel sick when racing at high speeds and taking quick turns.

reviews.review_description: I got on and was seen with confusing titorial where the steering was god awe full and how the grip steering never worked after I completed the first game I was brought back to the lobby where it was a exact replica of my own game clash royal I looked around and changed my name to something before I was horrified at the rude names I could make I played this game with my younger cousin who is new to vr and safe to say he will never play again as he was rammed in the back by a guy named “Diddy and Jeffrey Epstein” after we finished my younger cousin was kicked from the game and started screaming and crying before punching a hole in the wall and the tv

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing this feedback. We are deeply sorry to hear about your experience and the distress caused to your cousin.

Safety and moderation are top priorities for us, and we clearly failed to meet those standards in this instance. We are currently reviewing our naming filters to block offensive terms and investigating the behavior you described. Regarding the controls, we are working on improving the tutorial and grip mechanics to make them more intuitive.

reviews.review_description:
This game made me boom my pants out of anger
if i was slashed across the face by ted bundy i would be happier than being cucked by the bots constantly they are miles faster its unbelievable

developer_response.body: Thanks for your honest feedback! We've adjusted the bot difficulty based on your review. Happy racing!

reviews.review_description:
I tried kart VR games more than once. I was lacking speed in all of them. So boom karts, I was surprised that the speed was enough. And a lot of drifting,
 which is especially fun. It's fun to slide and at the last moment get out of the drift so as not to run off the track. Let's not forget that there is a battle royale mode. The main drawback is that there are not many tracks :(

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! Happy to hear you like the game and drift like a pro!

reviews.review_title: Targeted at the 10 and below players
reviews.review_description:
The game play is very simplistic It is essentially a VR version of the phone game whereas more touch controls than it is VR controls. It said you can grab the steering wheel with your grip buttons but I found that they don't work at all you are mostly staring with your thumb stick. 

You don't have any control over the power-ups that you get besides hitting them and the drifting does not work for VR. 

The tracks are extremely short it's nice that is period with the flat found version but this is a very super casual game and I'm quite sure the flat version it's also targeted at 10 or below.

The VR elements are well done as far as world scale and HUD elements so this is actually not a bad port it's just does nothing more for VR.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the detailed and honest feedback! 

To address the steering: the grip buttons should allow you to hold the wheel, but it requires a specific hand placement. We are currently working on making improving the 'grab' zones more forgiving for VR players.

Drifting in VR is automatic so when you take a turn and straighten the wheel you'll get a boost. 

We also hear you on the gameplay depth. Because we offer cross-play with the mobile version, some mechanics (like auto-power-ups and shorter tracks) were designed for quick sessions. However, we are always looking into ways to add more agency for our VR community.

reviews.review_description:
From what I can tell all the reviews are people that don't want learn how to play a game. Sure , there are quirky things that you need to get past , but every game is like that.
Everyone nowadays just wants to be congratulated, Without ever overcoming anything. Like a big circle jerk

Boom Karts feels like a bargain-bin kart racer pretending to be something bigger. The gameplay is basic, but everything around it drags the experience down. The graphics look like they were ripped straight from a decade-old mobile game-flat worlds, muddy textures, and almost no visual polish anywhere. It's hard to stay immersed when the environments look unfinished

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! We're constantly working on updates including visual improvements.

reviews.review_title: You were kicked from the game

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry to hear you had a bad experience. Sounds like it could've been a temporary connection issue. Please contact support in case the problem persists!

reviews.review_description: It's so bad I felt like Im dying its so bad my sould committed suicide
pire jeu de conduite au monde, le dérapage s'acrivera tout seul, et on ne peut pas attraper le volant

developer_response.body:
Bonjour, merci pour votre retour. Nous sommes désolés si cela n'était pas assez clair dans le tutoriel du jeu.

Sachez que le dérapage s'active automatiquement dès que vous tournez le volant. Pour obtenir un boost de vitesse, il suffit de redresser le volant en ligne droite à la sortie du virage. Une fois cette technique maîtrisée, la conduite devient beaucoup plus fluide. Nous espérons que cela vous aidera à mieux profiter de l'expérience!

reviews.review_description: i got kicked for no reason after 10 minutes

developer_response.body: Hello! Sorry to hear you had a bad experience. Sounds like it could've been a temporary connection issue on the server side. Please contact support in case the problem persists!
